project_type: CodeIgniter 3 PHP web application (School Management System)
build_system: No build system - standard PHP application served by web server
verification_instructions: Verify PHP syntax with php -l on modified files. Verify the logic is correct by reading through the code.
setup_instructions: No setup required - plain PHP CodeIgniter app
environment_constraints: No database available for runtime testing. Validation is limited to PHP syntax checks and code review.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing CodeIgniter 3 patterns: controllers extend Admin_Controller, use $this->db for queries, set_alert() for flash messages, translate() for i18n strings, redirect() for navigation.
key_patterns: Controllers extend Admin_Controller. Permission checks use is_superadmin_loggedin() and get_permission(). Flash messages use set_alert('success', 'message'). Redirects use redirect(base_url('route')). DB queries use CodeIgniter Query Builder ($this->db). Views use translate() for all labels. Forms use form_open/form_close helpers.
directory_structure: application/controllers/ - all controllers; application/models/ - all models; application/views/ - views organized by feature folders; application/helpers/ - helper functions; application/core/ - base controllers (MY_Controller, Admin_Controller)
